name: Policy Sensorium (CBS) + Security Layers
description: OpenClaw policy enforcement plugin with 4 layers: (L1) normalize + 23 dangerous patterns — critical block / high-medium smart-review; (L2) Springdrift-inspired D' CBS sensorium — injects <openclaw_state> before each LLM call, D' bands <0.35 LOW_ACCEPT / 0.35–0.55 MEDIUM_CONFIRM / ≥0.55 HIGH_REJECT; (L3) Ollama LLM smart-review + fast-lane (5 consecutive approvals bypass review) + JSONL approval log at ~/.openclaw/logs/; (L4) 39 secret patterns — API keys, tokens, passwords, private keys — redaction for output leak detection. Commands: policy-sensorium, policy-security, policy-reset-fastlane.

reportToUser.description: Agent reports CBS status (D', gate, last_result) in conversation after tool calls

sensoriumWindow.description: Number of recent cycles to consider for metrics

dGateThreshold.description: D' threshold below which actions are gated

sensoriumWindow.label: CBS Sensorium Window
sensoriumWindow.help: Number of recent cognitive cycles to consider for CBS signal computation

dGateThreshold.label: D' Gating Threshold
dGateThreshold.help: D' score below which the agent should slow down and reassess strategy
